Configuration options for building and debugging the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
The configuration options listed are used to customize the build process when using the `./waf configure` command. These options allow users to enable or disable specific features and functionalities. For example, the `--nojs` option disables JavaScript support, while the `--nowatchdog` option disables the watchdog feature. Options like `--nostop` and `--nosleep` are specific to STM32 microcontrollers, disabling STOP and sleep modes, respectively. The `--jtag` option allows users to select an alternative flash/debug probe. Logging options include setting the default log level with `--log-level` and disabling log message hashing with `--nohash`, which increases ROM usage but eliminates the need for a dictionary file to decode logs.
